# Badges & Status

Add these badges to your README.md:

```markdown
![GitHub](https://img.shields.io/github/license/xenon231tech/REPO_NAME)
![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/xenon231tech/REPO_NAME)
![GitHub forks](https://img.shields.io/github/forks/xenon231tech/REPO_NAME)
![GitHub issues](https://img.shields.io/github/issues/xenon231tech/REPO_NAME)
![GitHub last commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/xenon231tech/REPO_NAME)
![GitHub repo size](https://img.shields.io/github/repo-size/xenon231tech/REPO_NAME)
```

## Badge URLs

- License: `https://img.shields.io/github/license/xenon231tech/REPO_NAME`

- Issues: `https://img.shields.io/github/issues/xenon231tech/REPO_NAME`
- Last Commit: `https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/xenon231tech/REPO_NAME`
- Repo Size: `https://img.shields.io/github/repo-size/xenon231tech/REPO_NAME`
